answer:
<think> The "Fuzion" system is a role-playing game system used for creating tabletop RPGs. The co-developers of the Fuzion system are Greg Stafford and Lynn Willis. To find out which game was published by one of them individually, I need to look up their individual works. </think>

<answer> Greg Stafford developed the game "Glorantha" on his own. </answer>
